character.definition: an arched frame made of bamboo of wood board, a covering, mats woven from bamboo and other leaves top on vehicles, (same as 簂 槶) a bamboo chest; a wicker chest, a woman's headdress
leather; processed hides, trappings, known together as saddle; a saddle-like terrain or thing and rein, etc.
to take advantage of; to avail oneself of. to follow; to go
